results.rendered_html:
abhedya (3. a + bhedya)
1〉 adj. nicht spaltbar, undurchdringlich: kavaca  R. 6,79,65 . daṃśana  DEV. 2,27 . Davon nom. abstr. ˚tva  R. 3,7,21 : astrābhe˚.
— 2〉 n. Diamant  RĀJAN. _im_ ŚKDR.

results.rendered_html:
abhedya, abhaidika a.
1 Not to be divided, broken or pierced through, impenetrable.
2 Indivisible.
— dyaṃ A diamond.
